metadata.description: Personal plugin registry by rooftop-Owl — orchestration, research, presentation, and tooling plugins. Single source of truth; add once, install any plugin à la carte.

plugins.name: astraea
plugins.description: Orchestration kernel for Claude Code — multi-agent delegation, institutional memory, governance rules, cross-session continuity, and a 3-MCP-server stack (GitNexus, DeepWiki, QMD) for codebase intelligence and knowledge retrieval.

plugins.name: skill-factory
plugins.description: Portable skill lifecycle manager — search 300K+ skills, import from GitHub, validate against agentskills.io spec, remove cleanly with provenance tracking.

plugins.name: aeolus-agents
plugins.description: Thematic bundle for atmospheric-science research — aggregates dart-agents, climada-agents, wrf-chem-agents, and a bundled scientific-research sub-plugin. Install this to get the full science stack in one step.

plugins.name: dart-agents
plugins.description: SOTA skills and agents for DART ensemble data assimilation, Fortran development, WRF-Chem integration, and atmospheric science workflows.

plugins.name: climada-agents
plugins.description: Specialized skills for CLIMADA climate risk workflows — hazards, exposures, impacts, visualization, economics, committee governance.

plugins.name: wrf-chem-agents
plugins.description: Specialized skills for WRF-Chem episode simulation — chemistry configuration, mozbc species mapping, WPS/ERA5 preprocessing, and visualization.

plugins.name: research-zotero
plugins.description: Federated paper search across 22+ sources with venue/journal filtering, citation graph analysis, auto-tagging (regex + LLM), auto-classification, BibTeX export, MCP-compliant server, Semantic Scholar integration, and compounding Research KB (L1/L2/L3 hierarchy, synthesis grading, contradiction tracking, cross-session digests).

plugins.name: slideaway
plugins.description: Multi-engine presentation plugin with curated styles, progressive disclosure skill architecture, anti-AI-slop heuristics, and opt-in style preview + refinement loops. Generates PPTX, HTML, reveal.js, Beamer, and Marp decks.

plugins.name: notion-ao-research
plugins.description: Natural-language database operations, workspace setup, research methodology, infrastructure governance, and a bilingual (EN/KO) design handbook. Works with any MCP-compatible agent platform.

plugins.name: ephemeris
plugins.description: Living observatory of the AI/agent/coding-tooling landscape. Karpathy-style wiki with L1 references, L2 digests, and L3 cluster surveys kept alive by a GitHub-API liveness probe. Plugin code; data at github.com/rooftop-Owl/ephemeris.
